tool.name: nuclei_scan
tool.description: Run Nuclei template-based vulnerability scan. Uses 9000+ community templates to detect known vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and exposures.

parameter.name: severity
parameter.description: Filter by severity: info, low, medium, high, critical, or all (default: all)

parameter.name: extra_args
parameter.description: Additional nuclei command-line arguments (e.g., "-headless" or "-t custom-templates/")

returns.description: Structured findings with: - findings: list of vulnerabilities with template_id, severity, matched_at, description - by_severity: count of findings per severity level - total_findings: total count

tool.name: nuclei_scan_cves
tool.description: Scan specifically for known CVEs using Nuclei CVE templates.

returns.description: CVE findings with severity and references

tool.name: nuclei_scan_misconfigs
tool.description: Scan for misconfigurations and exposures using Nuclei.
